name: LGL GROUP INC
business: LGL Group designs and manufactures high-performance Frequency and Time reference standards for timing and synchronization in various applications, selling primarily through its subsidiary Precise Time and Frequency, LLC (PTF).

exposures.sentence: PTF's Frequency and Time Reference Standards include quartz Frequency Standards, global positioning system ("GPS") / global navigation system ("GNS") Frequency and Time Standards and rubidium atomic Frequency Standards.

Military applications include synchronization of mobile satcom terminals, high performance sources for calibration, and test equipment providing the ultimate in frequency stability and phase noise performance.

PTF is focused on the design and manufacture of high-performance Frequency and Time reference standards that form the basis for timing and synchronization in various applications including satellite communication, time transfer systems, network synchronization, electricity distribution and metrology.

PTF is focused on the design and manufacture of high-performance Frequency and Time reference standards that form the basis for timing and synchronization in various applications including satellite communication, time transfer systems, network synchronization, electricity distribution and metrology.
The industries PTF serves include computer networking, satellite ground stations, electric utilities, broadcasting, telecommunication systems, and metrology.
The Company's primary markets are communications, networking, aerospace, defense, instrumentation and industrial markets.
